cadence.note: Cron lives in the GitHub Actions workflow. This is documentation of intent.

publish.note: review-queue => creates a Buffer Idea (draft) tagged with the service. Never auto-publishes. Hope reviews + publishes from Buffer. Works even before TikTok is a connected channel, since idea.service is metadata.

hosting.note: git-raw => slide PNGs are committed and served via raw.githubusercontent.com so Buffer can ingest them. Requires a PUBLIC repo. In CI, repo+branch come from GITHUB_REPOSITORY / GITHUB_REF_NAME.

learning.note: Learner joins posts->experiments by date+service, computes a success signal vs the running baseline, and nudges the bandit Beta weights per pillar / hook_type / topic.

llm.note: Optional. If enabled AND ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set, the daily run can author a fresh concept from the playbook formulas instead of drawing from the seed bank. Off by default => deterministic, uses the vetted seed bank.
